arts.ttl: Serie A Liveblog inc Fiorentina-Milan, Juventus-Cagliari, Monza-Roma
Juventus faces selection challenges ahead of Cagliari clash: Douglas Luiz set to start
arts.sum: Juventus manager Thiago Motta is grappling with several player absences as his team prepares to face Cagliari in their upcoming match. The squad will be without key players Arek Milik, Vasilije Adzic, Nico Gonzalez, and Gleison Bremer. Additionally, Timothy Weah, despite returning to group training, is still experiencing physical issues and will not be included in the squad. The attacking options are particularly limited, while the defense will feel the significant absence of Bremer, who is sidelined for an extended period due to a cruciate ligament rupture.
